goal: Build a vision-gated inspection station: cubes pass under camera, vision classifier identifies good vs defective, divert chute steers good cubes to PassBin, defective to RejectBin. Realizes Phase 9 yrkesroll #7 (quality engineer persona).
thoughts: 5 cubes: 4 good (green), 1 defective (red dye). Vision classifier returns class per cube.
Robot routes by class: green → PassBin, red → RejectBin via color_routing arg.
configure_camera mounted above belt at z=1.20. Looks straight down. vision_detect_objects returns class per visible cube.
Already partially demonstrated by CP-48; this is the QA-engineer-flavored variant with explicit Reject path.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[2.5, 0.3, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.15, 0, 0],
)

for i, color in enumerate(["green","green","red","green","green"]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[-1.0 + i*0.20, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    create_material(material_name=f"mat_{color}_{i+1}", color=color)
    assign_material(prim_path=path, material_name=f"mat_{color}_{i+1}")
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

create_bin(prim_path="/World/PassBin", position=[0.5, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.30, 0.30, 0.15])
create_bin(prim_path="/World/RejectBin", position=[-0.5, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.30, 0.30, 0.15])

configure_camera(
    camera_path="/World/InspectCamera",
    position=[0, 0.4, 1.20],
    look_at=[0, 0.4, 0.78],
    fov=60,
)

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(5)],
    destination_path="/World/PassBin",
    color_routing={"green": "/World/PassBin", "red": "/World/RejectBin"},
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/PassBin", "/World/RejectBin"],
)
extension_notes: QA-engineer canonical: vision-gated divert. Color routing already supported by setup_pick_place_controller (CP-48 pattern). vision_detect_objects called once at canonical-build time to verify class mapping; runtime dispatch uses semantic labels.
failure_modes: vision_detect_objects may return different schema than expected
color_routing dispatch needs class-label registry; rolls back to destination_path if classifier errors
Red cube (Cube_3) reach RejectBin: not validated by gate (gate only checks PassBin); need separate test for reject path
